title: FMD - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to see how it is displayed on the list and map
scenario: Verify that disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds correctly splits and reunites the device display on the Find My Device list and map, with appropriate "Connected"/"Disconnected" tags per product type.
steps: 1. Connect both earbuds to the device and verify the device is shown as a single unit on the Find My Device list and map.
2. Disconnect the right earbud and observe the device splitting into parts on the list and map.

3. Verify the appropriate 'Connected'/'Disconnected' tags are displayed per product type:
   - Osprey: 3 parts (Left earbud, Right earbud, Charge Case)
   - Tern/Emu: 2 parts (Left earbud, Right earbud)
   - Flamingo: 2 parts (Earbud, Charge Case)
4. Disconnect the left earbud and verify both earbuds show as disconnected.
5. Reconnect the right earbud and observe the status update.
6. Reconnect the left earbud and verify the device returns to being shown as a single unit on the list and map.
expected: The device status on the Find My Device list and map correctly reflects connection changes: initially shown as a single unit when both earbuds are connected, splits into the appropriate number of parts with correct "Connected"/"Disconnected" tags when one earbud is disconnected, shows both disconnected when the left earbud is also disconnected, and returns to a single unit when both earbuds are reconnected.
